beats.name: Brynjar Andyrsson
beats.label: acted
beats.summary: Brynjar arrives by river at Millbrook's dark dock and is quietly assessed by a watchful local woman.

beats.name: Adelheid
beats.label: Talk to whoever is nearby
beats.summary: Mara confirms the errand to Piotr and quietly asks Adelheid to observe the uncatalogued plants on the east terrace — with permission to take cuttings.
